_note: Drop this on the S3's SD card as /sensors.json to exercise the stage-9 external-sensor framework. Each entry maps a manifest 'driver' to one driver-family file in Halberd/c5/main/sensors_drv_*.c. Edit, save, replug the card or reboot the S3 — no firmware rebuild needed.

sensors._comment: Sensirion SHT3x — temperature + humidity, CRC-protected. Strap-selectable address 0x44 (default) or 0x45 (ADDR pin pulled high). Probe is a 'periodic data acquisition with mps=1/s' command (0x2130) — the chip ACKs and begins measuring; first sample available ~15 ms later.
sensors.name: ambient

sensors._comment: TI TMP117 — high-precision temperature. Address strap 0x48..0x4B. Chip-ID register 0x0F returns 0x0117. Plain 2-byte register read, no CRC.
sensors.name: indoor_temp

sensors._comment: AOSong AHT20 — cheap temperature + humidity (Grove + AliExpress). Fixed address 0x38. The 'trigger measurement' command is 0xAC0033; ~80 ms later a 6-byte read returns 20-bit RH + 20-bit T sharing a middle nibble. The simple field-schema below approximates by reading 6 bytes raw and ignoring the bit-packing — adequate to confirm the driver wiring; precision tweaks land later.
sensors.name: cheap_env
